label: Select
summary: A native <select> in bevel chrome with a pixel down-arrow.
era: The guestbook's "How did you find my page?" dropdown, a real Windows combo box, right down to the arrow.

classes.name: rs-select
classes.role: native select in bevel chrome with the pixel down-arrow

a11y: It stays a native <select>: keyboard, screen readers and phone pickers all work untouched. We only paint the box the arrow lives on.
